---
title: Conference Papers
listing:
  contents: book_chapters.yml
  type: table
  max-description-length: 250
  sort-ui: false
  sort: date desc
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, author, categories]
  field-display-names: 
      title: 'Title'
      author: 'Authors'
      categories: 'Keywords'
link-external-newwindow: true
---
